negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_accident_2_6
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out onto a suburban street under a clear blue sky. The road stretches ahead, bordered by grassy sidewalks and a few scattered trees. On the right side of the street, there's a building with a sign that reads "LUCK OPTICAL," suggesting a business establishment. Several parked cars line the curb near this building. A white SUV is positioned at an intersection, seemingly waiting to turn left. To the left, a white pickup truck is seen driving towards the intersection. As the video progresses, the white SUV at the intersection begins to move forward, turning left into the adjacent street. At that moment, it is slightly hit by the oncoming white pickup. Both vehicles come to a stop in the middle of the intersection due to the collision.  A medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective captures the entire scene, emphasizing the suburban setting and the interaction between the two vehicles. The clear blue sky and the presence of scattered trees add to the serene yet dynamic atmosphere of the video.
